name: Bestever Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups All-purpose flour (Mama Always used Gold Medal)
1 tsp Each vanilla and lemon Extract (Mama always Substituted almond for the lemon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, shortening, and sugar until very light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time until very creamy.
3. Blend in flour, baking powder, and salt mixture alternately with milk in small amounts, beating well after each addition. Blend in flavorings.
4. Turn batter into greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
5. Bake in preheated oven at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
6. Turn off oven heat and allow cake to remain in oven for 15 minutes longer. (Or place cake in cold oven, set temperature to 300 degrees and bake for 1 hour 40 minutes.)
7. Cake is done when a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool 10-15 minutes in pan on a cake rack, then remove from pan and finish cooling on a rack.
9. Delicious as is, dusted with confectioners sugar, or frosted with 7-minute icing.
